athlete.notes: Right shoulder injury — monitor all pressing. Lower back strengthening priority.

program.name: Upper/Lower 5-Day Strength Program
program.split: Mon: Upper A | Tue: Lower A | Wed: Upper B | Thu: Lower B | Fri: Upper C

warmup.name: Face pull (cable)
warmup.notes: Rear delt and external rotation. Shoulder prehab — do not skip.

warmup.name: Bench press warm-up
warmup.notes: Bar, then ramp to working weight.

main.name: Barbell bench press
main.reps_note: 3 rounds of: 2 reps × 90.0 kg → 15 reps × 60.0 kg
main.notes: Elbows 45–60°. Keep 90 kg fixed; back-off progresses weekly. Shoulder protocol.

main.name: Incline dumbbell press
main.notes: Neutral grip reduces shoulder strain.

main.name: Overhead press (barbell)
main.notes: CAT — drive the bar explosively. Full lockout at top.

main.name: Back squat
main.notes: CAT on the way up. Brace hard before descent.

main.name: Romanian deadlift
main.notes: Hip hinge, neutral spine throughout. Focus on hamstring stretch at bottom.

main.name: Leg press
main.notes: Volume accumulation.

main.name: Weighted pull-up
main.notes: Lat pulldown is acceptable substitute if fatigued.

main.name: Barbell row
main.notes: Mid-back thickness.

main.name: Overhead press (dumbbell, seated)
main.notes: Shoulder stability — moderate load, not max effort.

accessories.name: Dead bug
accessories.notes: Deep core and lower back stability.

main.name: Conventional deadlift
main.notes: Brace hard. Neutral spine throughout. If lower back is accumulated from Tuesday, reduce 15% and treat as technique day.

main.name: Front squat or goblet squat
main.notes: Technique focus. Quad and upper back complement to Monday squat.

main.name: Bulgarian split squat
main.reps_note: each leg
main.notes: Single-leg stability and hip balance.

accessories.name: Good morning (barbell, light)
accessories.notes: Spinal erector endurance. Low load — not a strength exercise.

main.name: Cable chest fly
main.notes: Shoulder-friendly chest isolation. Feel the stretch at bottom.

main.name: Seated cable row (wide grip)
main.notes: Mid-back thickness accumulation.

main.name: Dumbbell overhead press (seated)
main.notes: Shoulder stability — moderate load.

main.name: Chest-supported dumbbell row
main.notes: Lower back removed from the equation entirely.

accessories.name: McGill bird-dog
accessories.notes: Lower back endurance and motor control. Always done last — end of week.
